name: Reducto
description: Vision-first document parsing and extraction API that converts PDFs, images and spreadsheets into LLM-ready structured JSON.

seo.title: Reducto — AI API / SDK for Developers
seo.meta_description: Reducto: Vision-first document parsing and extraction API that converts PDFs, images and spreadsheets into LLM-ready structured JSON.

when_to_use: Parsing complex PDFs with tables and charts into structured data
Extracting data from financial reports and legal documents via API
Building document ingestion pipelines that preserve layout context
Processing multi-column and scanned documents for RAG indexing

pros: Reliable table extraction for finance docs
cons: Premium pricing versus Unstructured or Llama Parse
review.verdict: Worth the premium when document-parsing accuracy materially drives product quality, especially in finance workflows.
review.best_for: Finance, legal, and insurance teams parsing messy PDFs at scale
review.not_for: Cost-sensitive apps where Unstructured.io already works fine
